name: analytics-office
description: An expert copilot for analytics delivery, built as a growing bench of skills. Live: 'groundwork' (orient on an inherited estate and build a living knowledge base), 'requirements-interrogator' (drive a solution-shaped request to the real decision before building), 'kpi-contract' (pin a metric's exact definition and lock it as a versioned contract), 'defend-my-number' (rehearse defending a number against a skeptic before the meeting), 'review-my-query' (review the query or model behind a number against its locked definition, read-only), 'brief-my-findings' (compose a findings brief for a stakeholder with every claim sourced and graded and open questions kept open, read-only), 'triage-my-number' (diagnose why a number is wrong or moved unexpectedly across the whole failure surface before explaining it, read-only), 'model-contract' (design the dimensional model before it is built: declare the grain, gate the source grain, and surface every structural fork for the owner to pin, read-only), 'kb-reconcile' (audit the accreted knowledge base against its sources and itself before its conclusions are used, flagging drift, contradictions, and unsourced numbers, read-only), 'audit-my-experiment' (validate an experiment / A-B result before it drives a decision: switches to audit-mode and computes the validity checks a consumption read eyeballs past — SRM, peeking, multiplicity, power — gating the rollout, read-only), and 'audit-my-assumptions' (surface and falsify the silent assumptions inherited from a source — proc, query, export — before building on OR reporting from them, so a stale or wrong premise doesn't cascade into a plausible wrong output, read-only), and 'audit-my-forecast' (audit a forecast / time-series projection before it drives a plan: switches to audit-mode and checks leakage, backtest validity, interval honesty, and drift — computing coverage and skill-vs-naive from the actuals-vs-predicted in hand — gating the plan, read-only).
